summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rakestake rebrand. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified all rebrand features including homepage branding, VIP page, casino search modal, and account requirement messaging. One minor issue found: Footer still shows 'NoToGreed.com' instead of 'Rakestake.com'.

issues: Footer still shows '© 2026 NoToGreed.com' instead of '© 2026 Rakestake.com' - needs to be updated in /app/frontend/src/components/Footer.js

passed_tests: Homepage shows 'Rakestake' branding in hero section
VIP Club navigation link styled with gold color (#ffd700)
Homepage has prominent VIP Club section with 'Rakestake VIP CLUB'
Homepage shows 'No account needed to join VIP' message
VIP page shows 'Rakestake VIP CLUB' branding
VIP page shows 'No account required to join VIP' message
Lottery section shows 'REGISTERED MEMBERS ONLY' badge
Forum section shows 'REGISTERED MEMBERS ONLY' badge
Casino selection modal opens when clicking REDEEM VIP ACCESS
Search works correctly - typing 'stake' shows only Stake.com
All 5 casinos shown after clearing search
Exclusive extras now say 'Rakestake' instead of 'NoToGreed' (verified in API)
Text is clearly visible with good contrast
action_items: Update Footer.js to change 'NoToGreed.com' to 'Rakestake.com' in /app/frontend/src/components/Footer.js line 6
critical_code_review_comments: VIPHub.js correctly uses 'Rakestake VIP CLUB' branding
Backend seed data correctly updated exclusive_extra fields to use 'Rakestake'
Casino search modal has proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None - using existing VIP campaigns from backend with updated Rakestake branding
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rakestake rebrand is complete. Homepage shows Rakestake branding in header and hero. VIP page shows 'Rakestake VIP CLUB'. Casino modal has search functionality that filters casinos correctly. Lottery and Forum sections show 'REGISTERED MEMBERS ONLY' badges. Account requirement messaging updated: 'No account required to join VIP' on both homepage and VIP page. One remaining issue: Footer.js still shows 'NoToGreed.com' instead of 'Rakestake.com'. All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing.
